blended.narrative: Belleayre Mountain is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 5.1 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 5,993 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 10 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 5" of snow, highs of 34°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: light rain showers, highs of 51°F.
